data.name: Dungeon of Delights
data.detailed_description:
Cacodaemons from nightmare lands have been summoned by the Sisters of Vesta. They are led by Eris, the Discordia.
Elylah the Princess of Lust needs to put an end to this.
It's time to crawl deep into the Pandora's Dungeon!
It's time to claim the Dungeon of Delights!
However, she won't do it alone.

An erotic visual novel based on wise choices with a fun battle system.

Features:
- Sprites animations frame by frame.
- Hand-drawn. Techniques: Acrylics, watercolors and rough pastels.
- Fun battle system based on wise decisions.
- Nearby checkpoints.
- Multiple ways.
- Wise decisions.
- No tasks to unlock. Just follow your story. No farming.
- Achievements.
- Filled with lust scenes.
- Simple, easy and intuitive user interface.
- Full HD

data.short_description: Elylah the Princess of Lust will claim her lands. She must delve in the Pandora's Dungeon, rescue the dreamers, and defeat Eris the Discordia. However, she does not expect to be chased by a fox. An erotic visual novel based on wise choices with a fun battle system.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Celeron 847 Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
